findings.evidence: `rg -n "\btail_le_exchangeableSigma\b|\bpathTail_le_exchangeableSigma\b" roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap code/TauCeti -g'*.lean'` finds roadmap lines 389-391 requesting `tail_le_exchangeableSigma`, but the code only declares `pathTail_le_exchangeableSigma` at lines 153-154.
findings.fix: Add the requested public alias/name `tail_le_exchangeableSigma : pathTail α ≤ exchangeableSigma α` (or rename the theorem if that is the intended canonical API) and keep any path-specific spelling only as an optional alias.
findings.issue: The containment theorem is exposed only as `pathTail_le_exchangeableSigma`, while the roadmap target and PR intent name the public API `tail_le_exchangeableSigma`; downstream Layer 2/6 code looking for the target name cannot use this PR as-is.

summary: The characteristic set and map API is now present, but the public theorem name does not match the roadmap target this PR claims to supply.
